title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Jarul as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a waste! We've been trekking through this massive castle all day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're done 'Ransacking Quest Castle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we don't even have a single giant diamond, pearl, or piece of gold to show for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-taso! You really shouldn't say such things out loud...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like I care about this Loki Monster, y'know!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: L-LOK?! Giant Diamond?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, it's nothing to worry about, pal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just lay back and get some rest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-taso, can you maybe tone it down a bit?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! Where's all the treasure?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami- Taso!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Treasure Tree Tour Group

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ain't surprising, but there's a hell of a lot to take in here. It's incredible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To summarize, we basically live on the tree's enormous branches...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Homes

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Adam Tree

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each one has a long and rich history of its own!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wow!! And that one?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that branch... was where Haugen village used to be.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lightning struck it one day, and it went up in flames...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It had gotten too dry and old... so there was no way to put it out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The entire branch was severed from the tree to ensure the fire wouldn't spread to any of the other villages.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. Bet that was a tough call... I guess even Adam trees aren't immune to time.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's Elbaf's biggest weakness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: fire and light- ning!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Western Village feast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: where did you sneak off to, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't seen Luffy or zero anywhere either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're probably just exploring!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Dats Right!! Dats right!! Good thinkin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WODO!!:) JARUL!! You've gotta meet our genius Navigator!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OHH!! Ain't she a beauty?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha! You pervy old man!! is she your type?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Bosha sha! My type, huh? Honestly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm into older women!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 'You're the oldest guy in the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's NO WAY 'YOU'LL FIND A WOTMAN LIKE THAT! DAMA HA HA HA HA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: YOOWOH!!

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: Jarulli

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
